content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLM output refinement can be boosted by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-refinement system that leverages both iterative self-feedback and cross-perspective inconsistency detection. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervised data while addressing its common limitation of getting stuck in local optima from single-perspective feedback.
